subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-03-07
subcodes.first_line: The greatest proof of the Blessed Perfection - may my life be a ransom to him! - consists in the fact that he was always manifest and evident under all conditions
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @station of the Manifestation of God, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment
